title: Youtube Poop: Pride Patties
description:
So guys, guess what game I like now. It's this one. It's me apologising for that bad YTP I made on that CaptainOhYeah account. Sorry for that vid, guise

But seriously, Sorry for being gone for such a long time. Technical difficulties n such... oh and I honestly didn't really feel like making a video. I went out of my way to make this though because I thought it would be fun. It was very fun actually. Well, I hope all of you enjoy it. That's all I got to say about it. Just sit back and enjoy the beat. It's like A YTP you can just listen to or just watch. It's just like that. Check it out guys. just check it out.
